attributes.additional_details: Privatisation has led to these services being decimated for personal profit by unscrupulous organisations to the point where the public are being put at serious risk.  These services should be non-profit making concerns. All revenue collected from customers & taxpayers should go to the running of that business with the renumeration of those at the top regulated openly and sensibly with some input from the public. We are sick (quite literally when it comes to water companies) of being ripped off.
attributes.background: Re-nationalise all essential services.  Privatisation has led to these services being decimated for personal profit by unscrupulous organisations to the point where the public are being put at serious risk.  These services should be non-profit making concerns.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do because we're not sure what you mean by "essential services".

You could start a new petition explaining clearly which services you would like the Government or Parliament to nationalise. 

Or you may wish to sign these petitions:

"Nationalise water companies to make water a non profit publicly owned asset"
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757426

"Nationalise public utilities & set up a committee of the public to oversee them" 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/753124
